evolution.title: Evolution
evolution.description: The upstream model changed. Review how the dependent models should react — accept the easy parts, resolve conflicts, and keep this screen open for the changes you fix manually in the editor.
evolution.no-project: No project selected. Open this page with a packageIri query parameter.

overview.description: Pending updates of vocabularies and specifications whose changes affect other models. Open an update and review how the dependent models should react.
overview.no-net-changes: The pending operations cancel each other out.

status.not-in-specification: Changes not yet visible in the specification

overview.no-targets: No dependent model reacts to this change — the update can be accepted as is.

action.skip-description: Accept the upstream changes as they are, without any reaction in the dependent models.
action.cancel-description: Discard the pending changes and keep all models as they are.

evolution.summary: {{operations}} upstream operations, {{items}} items affecting the profile
evolution.summary-counts: {{attention}} need attention · {{manual}} to resolve manually · {{applied}} applied
evolution.no-profile-impact: The upstream changes do not affect the application profile. Accepting the update will only apply the vocabulary changes.
evolution.requires-new-profiles: Requires class profiles that are proposed above — unchecking them deselects this item.
evolution.cascade-warning: Deleting also removes {{relationships}} dependent relationship profile(s) and {{generalizations}} generalization(s).
evolution.manual-todo: I resolved this manually in the conceptual model editor.
evolution.retyped-upstream: the class at this end changed upstream

item.create-class-hint: Create a class profile for it

profile-state.inherits: The profile inherits this value — the new value flows in automatically.
profile-state.override-matches-new: The profile overrides this value with "{{value}}", which now matches the new upstream value.
profile-state.override-differs: Conflict: the profile overrides this value with "{{value}}".
profile-state.not-inheritable: The profile has its own value "{{value}}".
